name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Orlando, FL's Swift Title Loans at 5781 Major Blvd provides title loans and payday advances for same-day cash solutions.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans' Orlando location stands at 5781 Major Blvd, Suite 101, offering convenient access for residents throughout central Orlando, FL. The storefront operates Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday 10 AM to 5 PM (closed Sundays), making it easy to fit a quick visit into your schedule.

At the Major Blvd location, customers can apply for title loans, payday loans, and cash advances with minimal hassle. Call the Orlando store directly at 407-871-6911 to discuss your options, check approval timelines, or ask about documentation requirements. The team specializes in fast funding for residents who need cash quickly.

If you're an Orlando resident with a vehicle title or short-term cash need, this location makes same-day approval possible. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and your vehicle title if applying for a title loan. Swift Title Loans serves the central Florida area with transparent rates and quick processing.
pros: Explicitly accepts bad credit borrowers and past bankruptcies with no credit hurdle
Same-day funding available for applications completed before noon
Wide loan range ($100–$50,000) accommodates both small emergencies and larger needs
Borrower keeps and drives the vehicle while the loan is outstanding
Saturday hours (10am–5pm) and extended weekday hours (9am–7pm) add flexibility
Online application secured with 256-bit SSL/TLS encryption
Reviews consistently cite patient, plain-language explanations from staff
cons: APR, fees, and repayment terms are not disclosed on the website—cost is opaque
Defaulting results in vehicle repossession, creating cascading financial risk
Single Memphis location only—no other branches or fully online servicing confirmed
Multiple reviews share nearly identical phrasing, raising authenticity concerns
No mobile app or automated payment reminders mentioned despite customer requests
best_for: Memphis, TN residents who own a vehicle outright or have significant equity in it
Borrowers with bad credit or bankruptcy history who cannot qualify at traditional lenders
People needing cash the same day for a medical bill, car repair, or utility shutoff
Individuals who need to keep driving their vehicle while accessing its equity
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best suited for Memphis residents with a paid-off or nearly paid-off vehicle who face an immediate cash emergency and cannot qualify for lower-cost alternatives. The main caveat is that title loans are among the highest-cost consumer credit products available, and failure to repay means losing the vehicle—making this appropriate only as a true last resort after exploring credit unions, employer advances, or community lending options.
services: In-person service at Memphis branch (1473 S Trezevant St #23)
Collateral-based personal loans using vehicle title
Title return upon full loan repayment
meta_description: Swift Title Loans at 5781 Major Blvd, Orlando, FL. Same-day title loans and payday advances.
seo_title: Swift Title Loans in Orlando, FL | CreditDoc
